summary: Tier-gate org-only POI read commands and add a --since fixture to sync-json.
reason: POI list/get are reserved for organization accounts (HTTP 403 on personal accounts) — tagged pp:requires-tier=org so dogfood skips them honestly. sync-json requires --since; added pp:happy-args so the live matrix supplies the initial-sync sentinel.
validated_outcome: Live dogfood 136/136 after the changes (POI skipped, sync-json passes with --since).
